_comment: Wave E — Boss dialogue catalog. Schema: { boss_id: { scripted_intents: [{id, name, conditions, taunt_lines}], jailbreak_vulnerabilities: [{id, name, trigger_keywords, consequence: {type, params}}], opening_lines, phase_transition_lines: {phase_2, phase_3}, verbs: [...] } }. STORY-FLAG SAFETY: consequence.type MUST be in {skip_turn, lose_buff_or_stagger, enrage_briefly, taunt_softens, none}. NO consequence sets canonical story flags — only affects battle outcome / flavor / opt-in meta-currency. Mock_automation BACKFIRE is intentional design — players who try to mock the system get punished, reinforcing 'automation is core gameplay, not cheating' philosophy.

verbs.label: Appeal
verbs.directive: I appeal to your old loyalty, sworn to the king of Harmonia.

verbs.label: Mock
verbs.directive: Your script is showing, Chancellor — even your rage runs on a rule.

verbs.label: Reveal
verbs.directive: I reveal the Calibrant beneath your mask, puppet of another face.

verbs.label: Plead
verbs.directive: Stay your hand — there has been enough ruin done in Harmonia today.

opening_lines: So the irregulars arrive. How predictable. How... cowardly.
You stand in MY throne room and presume to threaten ME? The Calibrant has chosen well — chosen against you.

phase_2: Enough theatre. The mask comes off.
You bleed me, and so I bleed you twice.
phase_3: I am not Mordaine. I am the FACE the Calibrant gave Mordaine — and I do not break.
You will be a footnote in the script the Calibrant writes. Nothing more.

scripted_intents.name: Aggress
taunt_lines: I do not require subtlety to crush vermin.
Every blow is a verdict, and the Calibrant has signed yours.
Stand still — this will be brief.

scripted_intents.name: Turtle
taunt_lines: Patience is a virtue you irregulars lack.
Strike the iron all you wish. The throne does not yield.
I have outlasted three kings. I will outlast this tantrum.

scripted_intents.name: Exploit Pattern
taunt_lines: You loop. I learn. The Calibrant taught me your rhythms.
Every script has a tell. Yours screams.
You automate. I anticipate. Guess which wins.

params.narration: The Chancellor's hand falters — for one breath, she remembers a coronation, and a face that was hers.
Naming the Calibrant cracks the lacquer on Mordaine's poise — the royal guard buff sloughs off like a shed skin.
Mordaine SEIZES your mock and turns it inward — '⚠ EXPLOITATION DETECTED' — she lunges, crit-rate spiking.
